title: Magicians Live Forever
description: Magic mod with coca cola, wandering traders, and a whole lot of surprise!
body:
# THE VILLAGER IN THE THUMBNAIL IS NOT IN THE GAME.

The best mod you will ever see!

**RIGHT CLICK TO USE THE INTERACTABLE ITEMS**

**BLINK MIRROR**: When you look somewhere and right click, you will be teleported to the place you looked. If you are in the air, or your destination is in the air, you will get levitation effect.

**ECHO HAMMER**: If you right click, every mob in a 50x50x50 distance will launch in the air.

**WANDERING TRADER**: Spawns 50 wandering traders on right click.

**WAND**: Kills everything within a 10 block distance.

**PREMIUM WAND**: Kills everything within a 50 block distance.

**PUSH N' PULL**: Right clicking pulls everything within a 10 block radius on default, but holding shift and right clicking changes to push mode and pushes everything within a 10 block radius.

**RANDOMIZER**: Spawns a random animal near you on right click.

**STAFF**: Used to craft wand.

**ECHO CORE**: Used to craft wand.

**FUNNY BERRY**: Berries laced with coca cola powder (coke).

**COKE**: Coca Cola powder.

**COKE COLA**: Coke and Carbonated Water

**WEIRD PROTIEN BAR**: A protein bar with radiation all over it.
